title: Senior Teacher - IIT Delhi - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIT Delhi - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
IIT Delhi, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Delhi:
IIT Delhi is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Delhi!
